Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast.extension

Class ExtensionSignature

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.extension.ExtensionSignature
Direct Known Subclasses:
ExtensionSignature.ExpressionExtSignature, ExtensionSignature.PredicateExtSignature
public abstract class ExtensionSignature extends Object
A class which allows to uniquely identify an operator occurrence by identifying its arguments and return type.

  • Method Details

    • getSignature

      public static ExtensionSignature.ExpressionExtSignature getSignature(ParametricType src)
      Returns the signature of a parametric type occurrence.
      Parameters:
      src - some parametric type
      Returns:
      the signature of the parametric type

    • getSignature

      public static ExtensionSignature.ExpressionExtSignature getSignature(ExtendedExpression src)
      Returns the signature of an expression extension occurrence.
      Parameters:
      src - some extended expression
      Returns:
      the signature of the extension at the root of the given formula

    • getSignature

      public static ExtensionSignature.PredicateExtSignature getSignature(ExtendedPredicate src)
      Returns the signature of a predicate extension occurrence.
      Parameters:
      src - some extended predicate
      Returns:
      the signature of the extension at the root of the given formula

    • getChildTypes

      private static Type[] getChildTypes(IExtendedFormula src)

    • makePowerSetTypes

      private static Type[] makePowerSetTypes(Type[] src)

    • getSymbol

      public String getSymbol()
      Returns the symbol associated to this signature. This symbol might not be a valid identifier.
      Returns:
      the symbol associated to this signature

    • isATypeConstructor

      public abstract boolean isATypeConstructor()
      Returns whether the extension with this signature is a type constructor.
      Returns:
      whether this signature corresponds to a type constructor

    • isAtomic

      public boolean isAtomic()
      Returns whether this signature is atomic, that is denotes an operator that does not have any child.
      Returns:
      whether this signature is atomic

    • getFunctionalType

      public Type getFunctionalType(FunctionalTypeBuilder builder)
      Returns the type of a function that could be used to replace an occurrence of the extension with this signature.
      Returns:
      the type of a replacement function

    • getRelationalType

      public Type getRelationalType(FunctionalTypeBuilder builder)
      Returns the type of a relation that could be used to replace an occurrence of the extension with this signature. To be used in the special case of type constructors.
      Returns:
      the type of a replacement relation

    • getReturnType

      protected abstract Type getReturnType()
